company: U.S. Digital Corps @ Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services
description: Selected as part of the top 3.5% of applicants for the U.S. Digital Corps program, developing critical tools and dashboards for government software operations.

Facilitated knowledge-sharing sessions and acted as liaison between partner organizations

description: Leading the complete relaunch of a revolutionary nightlife discovery iOS application, implementing modern architecture and social features.

Built real-time check-in tracker using Core Location for automatic venue check-ins after 15+ minutes

company: Office of Administrative Trials and Hearings

Conducted regular data audits to ensure data integrity and accuracy
